candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: You discover a transmembrane protein $\alpha$ that, like most transmembrane proteins, exhibits a transmembrane domain composed of $\alpha$ helices. You next discover that $\alpha$ serves as a channel. What is a likely amino acid sequence for some portion of the transmembrane domain? (See <image 1> for one-letter abbreviations)
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 您会发现跨膜蛋白 $\alpha$ 与大多数跨膜蛋白一样,表现出由 $\alpha$ 螺旋组成的跨膜结构域。接下来,您会发现 $\alpha$ 蛋白用作离子通道。对于跨膜结构域的某些部分,可能的氨基酸序列是什么?(有关单字母氨基酸缩写,请参见<图像1>)
